keywords: walk exercise energy outdoor routine dog
guidance: Dogs usually benefit from a predictable exercise routine that matches age and energy level.
guardrail: Do not schedule intense exercise for an injured or medically restricted pet without veterinary advice.

keywords: medicine medication heartworm pill dose reminder dog
guidance: Medication tasks should be high priority and easy to notice in the daily schedule.
guardrail: Do not invent medication names or dosages; only remind for owner-provided care tasks.

keywords: cat breakfast dinner feeding meal food routine
guidance: Cats often do well with consistent feeding times and calm routines.
guardrail: Do not recommend diet changes for medical conditions without veterinary advice.

keywords: cat brush coat grooming hairball nails
guidance: Grooming reminders help prevent skipped care tasks, especially for long-haired cats.
guardrail: Stop grooming if the pet shows pain, distress, or skin irritation.

keywords: senior older age gentle mobility check comfort
guidance: Senior pets may need gentler routines, shorter sessions, and closer observation.
guardrail: Senior or sick pet concerns should be reviewed with a veterinarian.

keywords: conflict busy overlap schedule same time overload
guidance: When tasks overlap, the system should flag conflicts and recommend spreading care tasks apart.
guardrail: Do not hide conflicts; show them so the owner can adjust the schedule.
